notes: XBox controller worked. Also, I could take back my save from Windows.
title: Ys I & II Chronicles+

notes: Works perfectly except cinematics don't play. Easy enough to Youtube the intro if you want. No effect on gameplay.
title: Ys I & II Chronicles+

notes: Received an error message but ignored it and the game seemed to work fine.
title: Ys I & II Chronicles+

cpu: AMD A8-5550M APU with Radeon HD Graphics
notes: Animated cutscenes do not play but ca be skipped or toggled off in settings, in Ys II parts of the HUDs text in Chronicles mode turns white when the screen fades to black before or after an in-game cutscene. Game plays perfectly fine.
title: Ys I & II Chronicles+

notes:
Gameplay seems smooth, all three music options are available, gamepad works out-of-the-box but cut-scenes fail as has been reported by others. This can be fixed via protontricks (rather large download): 
"protontricks 223810 quartz amstream"
Solution was found here: https://appdb.winehq.org/objectManager.php?sClass=version&iId=35806 (winegstreamer does not need to be deactivated anymore).
title: Ys I & II Chronicles+
